item.title: [Segurança] Actively Exploited nginx-ui Flaw (CVE-2026-33032) Enables Full Nginx Server Takeover
item.description:
🚨 Actively Exploited nginx-ui Flaw (CVE-2026-33032) Enables Full Nginx Server Takeover
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
A recently disclosed critical security flaw impacting nginx-ui, an open-source, web-based Nginx management tool, has come under active exploitation in the wild. The vulnerability in question is CVE-2026-33032 (CVSS score: 9.8), an authentication bypass vulnerability that enables threat actors to seize control of the Nginx service. It has been codenamed MCPwn by Pluto Security.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/critical-nginx-ui-vulnerability-cve.html

item.title: [Segurança] April Patch Tuesday Fixes Critical Flaws Across SAP, Adobe, Microsoft, Fortinet, and More
item.description:
🚨 April Patch Tuesday Fixes Critical Flaws Across SAP, Adobe, Microsoft, Fortinet, and More
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.9
Resumo:
A number of critical vulnerabilities impacting products from Adobe, Fortinet, Microsoft, and SAP have taken center stage in April's Patch Tuesday releases. Topping the list is an SQL injection vulnerability impacting SAP Business Planning and Consolidation and SAP Business Warehouse (CVE-2026-27681, CVSS score: 9.9) that could result in the execution of arbitrary database
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/april-patch-tuesday-fixes-critical.html

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-34457 - Nginx
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-34457 - Nginx
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
OAuth2 Proxy is a reverse proxy that provides authentication using OAuth2 providers. Versions prior to 7.15.2 contain a configuration-dependent authentication bypass in deployments where OAuth2 Proxy is used with an auth_request-style integration (such as nginx auth_request) and either --ping-user-agent is set or --gcp-healthchecks is enabled. In affected configurations, OAuth2 Proxy treats any request with the confi...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-34457

item.title: [Segurança] New PHP Composer Flaws Enable Arbitrary Command Execution — Patches Released
item.description:
🚨 New PHP Composer Flaws Enable Arbitrary Command Execution — Patches Released
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Two high-severity security vulnerabilities have been disclosed in Composer, a package manager for PHP, that, if successfully exploited, could result in arbitrary command execution. The vulnerabilities have been described as command injection flaws affecting the Perforce VCS (version control software) driver. Details of the two flaws are below - CVE-2026-40176 (CVSS
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/new-php-composer-flaws-enable-arbitrary.html

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-32168 - Azure
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-32168 - Azure
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.8
Resumo:
Improper input validation in Azure Monitor Agent allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-32168

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-26154 - Windows Server
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-26154 - Windows Server
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
Improper input validation in Windows Server Update Service allows an unauthorized attacker to perform tampering over a network.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-26154

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-39956 - Check Point
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-39956 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.1
Resumo:
In commits after 69785bf77f86e2ea1b4a20ca86775916889e91c9, the _strindices builtin in jq's src/builtin.c passes its arguments directly to jv_string_indexes() without verifying they are strings, and jv_string_indexes() in src/jv.c relies solely on assert() checks that are stripped in release builds compiled with -DNDEBUG. This allows an attacker to crash jq trivially with input like _strindices(0), and by crafting a n...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-39956

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-20945 - Office
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-20945 - Office
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 4.6
Resumo:
Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') in Microsoft Office SharePoint allows an authorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-20945

item.title: [Inteligência de Ameaças] Critical Patches Issued for Microsoft Products, April 14, 2026
item.description:
💣 Critical Patches Issued for Microsoft Products, April 14, 2026
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: CIS Advisories
Fonte: CIS Advisories
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered in Microsoft products, the most severe of which could allow for remote code execution. Successful exploitation of the most severe of these vulnerabilities could result in an attacker gaining the same privileges as the logged-on user. Depending on the privileges associated with the user, an attacker could then install programs; view, change, or delete data; or create new a...
Link: https://www.cisecurity.org/advisory/critical-patches-issued-for-microsoft-products-april-14-2026_2026-036

item.title: [Segurança] CISA flags Windows Task Host vulnerability as exploited in attacks
item.description:
💣 CISA flags Windows Task Host vulnerability as exploited in attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
government agencies to secure their systems against a Windows Task Host privilege escalation vulnerability that could allow attackers to gain SYSTEM privileges.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cisa-flags-windows-task-host-vulnerability-as-exploited-in-attacks/

item.title: [Segurança] McGraw-Hill confirms data breach following extortion threat
item.description:
💣 McGraw-Hill confirms data breach following extortion threat
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Education company McGraw-Hill has confirmed in a statement to BleepingComputer that hackers exploited a Salesforce misconfiguration and accessed its internal data.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/mcgraw-hill-confirms-data-breach-following-extortion-threat/

item.title: [Segurança] Microsoft adds Windows protections for malicious Remote Desktop files
item.description:
📰 Microsoft adds Windows protections for malicious Remote Desktop files
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Microsoft has introduced new Windows protections to defend against phishing attacks that abuse Remote Desktop connection (.rdp) files, adding warnings and disabling risky shared resources by default.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/microsoft/microsoft-adds-windows-protections-for-malicious-remote-desktop-files/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] From Prototype to Production: Securing Database MCP at Enterprise Scale
item.description:
📰 From Prototype to Production: Securing Database MCP at Enterprise Scale
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
How the VMware Tanzu Greenplum MCP Server Puts puts security patterns into practice (Part 2: The enterprise implementation) In Part 1 of this blog series, I laid out why database access is the hardest MCP problem and explored the security patterns every implementation needs to get right. I used gp-mcp-server, an open source prototype I …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/tanzu/from-prototype-to-production-securing-database-mcp-at-enterprise-scale/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Optimized Monitoring for Hybrid Environments with ICT Solutions
item.description:
📰 Optimized Monitoring for Hybrid Environments with ICT Solutions
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Zabbix
Fonte: https://blog.zabbix.com/feed/
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
ICT Solutions is a managed service provider (MSP) specializing in fully managed IT Support, cloud, cybersecurity and more. Based in Liverpool, they offer IT support across the UK. They work together with Zabbix Premium Delivery Partner Opensource ICT Solutions to make sure that their customers get solid insights into their environments.
Link: https://blog.zabbix.com/optimized-monitoring-for-hybrid-environments-with-ict-solutions/32839/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] How AI-Assisted Analytics in Tanzu Data Intelligence Can Help Remove the SQL Bottleneck
item.description:
📰 How AI-Assisted Analytics in Tanzu Data Intelligence Can Help Remove the SQL Bottleneck
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The operational bottleneck, which frustrates every modern, data-driven enterprise, is a universal challenge. Business leaders have urgent, high-value questions, but the answers are often locked behind a wall of complex database syntax. Historically, a human translator, typically a data analyst, was needed to bridge this gap. This process often involved spending hours writing, testing, and …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/tanzu/how-ai-assisted-analytics-in-tanzu-data-intelligence-removes-the-sql-bottleneck/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] VMware Tanzu RabbitMQ Powers the Modern Data Lakehouse with New Spark Integration and Enterprise Tooling
item.description:
📰 VMware Tanzu RabbitMQ Powers the Modern Data Lakehouse with New Spark Integration and Enterprise Tooling
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In the modern enterprise, it flows constantly between operational and analytical systems. To stay competitive, organizations need a real-time data fabric that doesn’t just move information but actively connects these two worlds. We are excited to announce major updates to VMware Tanzu RabbitMQ that are designed to bridge the gap between …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/tanzu/vmware-tanzu-rabbitmq-powers-the-modern-data-lakehouse-with-new-spark-integration-and-enterprise-tooling/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Introducing Tanzu Platform 10.4: Extending Platform as a Service to Agentic Applications
item.description:
📰 Introducing Tanzu Platform 10.4: Extending Platform as a Service to Agentic Applications
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 0.4
Resumo:
For years, the enterprise has been caught between two conflicting forces. Developers seek the agility and speed to innovate at the pace of business, while platform engineers are tasked with ensuring that this development innovation adheres to the business’s operational, security, and compliance standards. This inherent tension is significantly amplified in the age of AI.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/tanzu/introducing-tanzu-platform-10-4/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Forward-looking MSSPs are moving to Elastic Security
item.description:
📰 Forward-looking MSSPs are moving to Elastic Security
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: https://www.elastic.co/blog/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Learn how next-generation MSSPs are escaping tool sprawl, cutting costs, and delivering faster, smarter threat detection on a single, agentic security operations platform. By Peter Weller April 15, 2026 Share on Twitter Share on Twitter Share on LinkedIn Share on LinkedIn Share on Facebook Share on Facebook Share by Email Share by Email Print this page Print Summary Elastic Security leverages resource-based pricing t...
Link: https://www.elastic.co/blog/managed-security-service-providers
